channel.title: Gravel Things
channel.description: Stu Streeter, proud age grouper and certified "gravel dad,"  talking all things gravel with some of the most influential people in the sport.
channel.itunes:summary: Join Stu Streeter, proud age grouper and certified ”gravel dad,” in conversations about all things gravel with some of the most influential voices in the gravel cycling world.
channel.itunes:author: Stu Streeter

item.title: Derek Teel: Everesting his way back to the top
item.itunes:title: Derek Teel: Everesting his way back to the top
item.description:
Derek Teel is a personal trainer, Instagram sensation, hard man on the road bike, and former Enduro racer who has spent the last few years rehabbing following a near fatal hit and run. Derek runs Dialed Health and the "Dialed Health Fam," depends on his strength and mobility coaching to keep their cycling goals from derailing by injury. 

Derek is also a Specialized athlete and his insights in this new age of the Super Team are interesting and insightful. You're gonna love this episode.

We talk RADL GRVL, and his upcoming Everest in our own backyard of Auburn, CA. 

Don't forget to shop Silca.cc for all of your best-in-class products like the portable compressor Derek went out and purchased. I have been using their bottle cages, wax, rim tape, and more. Use "GRAVELTHINGSPODCAST15" at checkout for a tidy little discount.

 

  • Follow the pod @gravelthingspodcast
  • Follow Stu @ridingthefences
  • Follow Derek @dialedhealth
  • Check out the Dialed Health offerings at dialed health.com
  • Watch on the Gravel Things YouTube channel

item.title: Bobby Wintle: The Midsouth ring leader and dream maker
item.itunes:title: Bobby Wintle: The Midsouth ring leader and dream maker
item.description:
On this, our first episode of Gravel Things, Stu and Bobby talk all things Midsouth, including some predictions based on the pro start list. Bobby gives a sneak peek of the main stage line up for bands, details on the new start finish venue and more.

 

Bobby Wintle is Midsouth Gravel's founder and ring leader. His famous finish line hugs and boundless energy is a site to behold. What he has created in Stillwater Oklahoma is a delicate mix of music festival, inclusive party, bike race, and tour of local beer. 

 

This episode is supported by the good people and first-in-class products from Silca. Please support Silca by purchasing some gear today at silca.cc use "GravelThingsPodcast15" for a great discount. Thanks Silca!

 

Links worth following:

  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Bobby at @unlearnpavement
  • Johnny Mullenax Live at District Bicycles
  • The Midsouth
  • Silca.cc

item.title: Episode 38: California Calls the Kings
item.itunes:title: Episode 38: California Calls the Kings
item.description:
After a long holiday hiatus we are back with big news on the future of Gravel Kings (it's good news). Plus we talk winter training, the King's new Sauna, race recaps from RADL GRVL, Santa Val, and Ted's P10 at Low Gap...All this and more!

Links and notes of interest:

  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Check out Ted's YouTube Vlog from his Coast Trip here: https://youtu.be/h6VfahVLuRI?si=a6wAoB7yHkl8PSKk

item.title: Episode 37: End of Year AWARDS SHOW!
item.itunes:title: Episode 37: End of Year AWARDS SHOW!
item.description:
With the race season now in the rearview, it's time to cue up the 2025 AWARDS SHOW! Tune in to see if your picks for top performances, best season overall, biggest surprises, the "DID THAT JUST REALLY HAPPEN?" award, and more.

A few more notes of interest:

  • Thank you Silca for supporting this episode! Don't miss out, pay them a visit in November at www.silca.cc and use the code gravelkings5 to get 5% savings on top of their massive month-long Black Friday prices!
  • Watch Ted's favorite Silca video of Josh Portner here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g8BbR-Py02o
  • Stu tore up RodeoCross. Check out Gravel Bike California's video here: https://youtu.be/_v3NsP6OGZs?si=qgaDUcrY2WIzGrkf
  • UnTapped just released Salted Cinnamon Spice! Check it out here: https://untapped.cc/product/salted-cinnamon-spice-untapped/
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com
  • As always, give us a follow at @gravelkingspodcast on IG
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking

item.title: Episode 36: Megahopper, What IS the Off-Season, Wrap Up to LTGP
item.itunes:title: Episode 36: Megahopper, What IS the Off-Season, Wrap Up to LTGP
item.description:
Thank you SILCA for your support of the pod! Get 15% off your next purchase at Silca.cc by using the code GraveKings15.

The gang is back together! Welcome back to episode 36, this is a good'n as we have lots to cover. Ted wrapped up his Megahopper, 414 miles around northern California, Laura is bouncing between maintaining fitness and debating an off-season, Stu is bunny hopping his way into the cross season, there's lots to cover as always.

  • Check out Ted's video from VTXL here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-02v8T1bcJM
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 35: UCI Gravel Worlds, Bikepacking and FKTs Galore, Sickness, and Jetlag, What Else IS There?!
item.itunes:title: Episode 35: UCI Gravel Worlds, Bikepacking and FKTs Galore, Sickness, and Jetlag, What Else IS There?!
item.description:
Welcome to episode 35 of Gravel Kings! After a few weeks of busy late season racing, we opted for have just Laura and Ted sit down to chat as our schedules with Stu aren't quite lining up. But we're eager to hear where he's been lately too, stay tuned!

Laura is freshly back from the UCI gravel world championships, filled with mayhem, drama, and good times. Ted FKT'ed the VTXL and then bikepacked across Portugal, he's off to the Megahopper in northern California in a few short hours. This one is action packed so stay tuned!

  • Check out Ted's video from Portugal here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mDmEXupJVmMhttps://open.spotify.com/episode/4oJNdH6UOZ0Xyu8HLpD4aT?si=eREgUdcxSBqTkX4Sl18VJA
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 34: Gravel Worlds, Vermont Overland, Fistful of Dirt, and How to Stay Regular!
item.itunes:title: Episode 34: Gravel Worlds, Vermont Overland, Fistful of Dirt, and How to Stay Regular!
item.description:
Hello and welcome back to Gravel Kings! Labor Day in the rearview mirror means summer is drawing to a close. So late season races are fast and furious -- Ted was at Gravel Worlds and donned his road attire for Green Mountain Stage Race. Laura got to try her hand at Vermont Overland and came away with nothing but smiles. Stu had an, umm... interesting go at Fistful of Dirt in Wyoming, but he came away lighter AND with a trip to the podium!

  • Check out Ted's John Gaston episode here: https://open.spotify.com/episode/4oJNdH6UOZ0Xyu8HLpD4aT?si=eREgUdcxSBqTkX4Sl18VJA
  • Shout out to Cycle Works in Lincoln, Nebraska!
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 33: Leadville recap, Rocky Mountain Adventures, Gravel Worlds, and Another New Game
item.itunes:title: Episode 33: Leadville recap, Rocky Mountain Adventures, Gravel Worlds, and Another New Game
item.description:
Welcome back to a midsummer treat here on episode 33. We talk about Laura's recent return from the high mountain air of Colorado including a run-in with a moose, Ted's linked together back-to-back wins(!) and is next off to Gravel Worlds in Nebraska, Stu has his favorite Fist Full of Dirt on the horizon and the start of his beloved cyclocross just around the corner. #crossiscoming!

  • We are thankful to our show partner PERC Coffee for supporting this episode! Use this link to get 15% off your next order OR use the code gravelkings15: https://perccoffee.com/discount/gravelkings15?utm_source=podcast&utm_campaign=gravel-kings
  • A link to Ted's video from Kingdom Trails: https://youtu.be/NZx6OYVXCPg
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 32: TOURS de France Coverage, Leadville Stage Race, Race Day Survive Kit, and a New Game
item.itunes:title: Episode 32: TOURS de France Coverage, Leadville Stage Race, Race Day Survive Kit, and a New Game
item.description:
Gravel Kings is back with a mid-summer classic. In peak summer form, we have talk of the men's Tour de France and the Tour de France Femmes Avec Zwift. Laura comes up big with an exciting new game for the other guests to play and you, the listener at home! There's a lot more in store, so buckle up.

    • Visit @gravelkingspodcast and send us your questions or to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com
    • Thanks to PERC Coffee for supporting this episode! Use the code gravelkings15 for a nice discount off your next coffee purchase.

item.title: Episode 31: Tour Time, baby! UCI Rules Pertain to Gravel? New "Who Am I?" Game, and More!
item.itunes:title: Episode 31: Tour Time, baby! UCI Rules Pertain to Gravel? New "Who Am I?" Game, and More!
item.description:
Welcome back to Gravel Kings! Another exciting episode in store with a new game to kick things off, Who Am I? We'll talk about the latest debate in which the UCI has inserted their foot firmly in their mouth, this time about handlebar measurements and whether the rule will extend to gravel. The Tour de France is upon us, so naturally we'll talk Tour. That plus answering your questions, as we always love to do.

  • Visit @gravelkingspodcast and send us your questions or to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com
  • Thanks to PERC Coffee for supporting this episode! Use the code gravelkings15 for a nice discount off your next coffee purchase.
  • Ted is excited to attend the Kelly Brush Ride. JOIN Ted's team, or support in any capacity, here: give.kellybrushfoundation.org/team/663552
  • Laura's blog we reference about motivation (and the spiral!) can be found here: athletemother.substack.com/p/the-spiral-and-the-step-back

Visit @gravelkingspodcast and send us your questions or to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com Thanks to PERC Coffee for supporting this episode! Use the code gravelkings15 for a nice discount off your next coffee purchase. Ted is excited to attend the Kelly Brush Ride. JOIN Ted's team, or support in any capacity, here: give.kellybrushfoundation.org/team/663552 Laura's blog we reference about motivation (and the spiral!) can be found here: athletemother.substack.com/p/the-spiral-and-the-step-back

item.title: Episode 30: LIVE FROM GRAVEL KINGS WEEKEND!

item.description:
This is an exciting first; we're live from Gravel Kings Weekend at Mad Bush Falls in Waitsfield, VT! We recorded on Saturday evening of this three day getaway. item.title: Episode 29: UNBOUND Week in Review, Gravel Hall of Fame, Laura Goes to the Hospital, and More
item.itunes:title: Episode 29: UNBOUND Week in Review, Gravel Hall of Fame, Laura Goes to the Hospital, and More
item.description:
Buckle in for our longest show yet, as we're celebrating UNBOUND, the XL, and (mostly) all things Emporia, Kansas.

UNBOUND is the grand daddy of gravel racing so with racing in the Flint Hill now a thing of the past in 2025, the first half of the season has come to a close. But that just opens up a chance to analyze every detail of the race. From the heat to the competition, the wicked international line up, how badly the heat crippled Laura, Ted's go at the XL, and how it all fits together.

Visit madbushfalls.com/gravel-kings-weekend as there are still spots to join us June 20-22!

You can watch the whole Hall of Fame ceremony including Ted's speech at THIS website.

Laura's blog from UNBOUND.

Ted's blog from UNBOUND.

  • We have an incredible sponsor in PERC Coffee! Pay them a visit and use code gravelkings15 for handy discount on your next best cup of coffee!
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 28: UNBOUND week, Gravel Locos Recap, Injuries, and Caffeination Station
item.itunes:title: Episode 28: UNBOUND week, Gravel Locos Recap, Injuries, and Caffeination Station
item.description:
It was hot and humid in Texas and now we're in cold and dank Kansas for Unbound. Was all that heat training a waste of time?! What happens when you invest so much and then get hit by a truck, like Dylan Johnson did after logging 100 hours of training the past three weeks for Unbound? Gosh, this plus so much more in this riveting episode of Gravel Kings.

  • We have a great new sponsor in PERC Coffee! Pay them a visit and use code gravelkings15 for handy discount on your next best cup of coffee!
  • Check out the Live Slow Ride Fast youtube of Rwanda here: https://youtu.be/yMmkwdUoETE?si=c0KdULvzYJBI_TRC
  • Here's my Gravel Locos post-race telemetry+commentary video:  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VA63FESVQh8 
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 27: Growler, Traka, Highlands UCI Summary, Plus QnA
item.itunes:title: Episode 27: Growler, Traka, Highlands UCI Summary, Plus QnA
item.description:
How often do you replace your cycling shoes? Great question! There's that plus many more, lots of chatter about recent bike races all across the northern hemisphere, as well as the typical Gravel Kings banter.

Hey, we're excited to boast about our friends at Trueform Design who are supporting this episode. Do you have a back of the napkin idea that you'd like to make into a tangible reality? Whether it’s short-run machining jobs, TIG Welding or innovative prototypes, Trueform makes it happen with CNC Mills, Lathes, 3D Printing, precision and passion. Check them out at www.trueformdesign.com and @trueform_design

  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 26: Sea Otter Hangover, Fake FKT, Levi's on the Horizon
item.itunes:title: Episode 26: Sea Otter Hangover, Fake FKT, Levi's on the Horizon
item.description:
Welcome back! The crew was together this past weekend at Sea Otter and is getting together this coming weekend. Face to face time is hard to beat and so was the fun these consecutive weeks! As always, we have your fun questions to answer, but lots of other recent fodder to cover. Heck, and we don't even talk the roundup of the UCI spring classics! This is a humdinger, so sit back and enjoy.

 

Head on over to DialedHealth.com and use the code GRAVELKINGS for 20% off annual memberships. We three are all recent converts to Dialed Health's amazing programs and know you'll enjoy them too.

 

Check out our upcoming Gravel Kings Weekend at Mad Bush Falls! This weekend guarantees good fun, good vibes, good rides, good food, good drink, good creemees, good gravel, good LIVE podcasting, and good people -- among other things. This event is June 20-22, 2025 in Waitsfield, VT and you can find out more at: https://www.madbushfalls.com/gravel-kings-weekend 

  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 24: The Season Kicks into Gear! MidSouth, UCI doing Gravel, Loads of Q's!
item.itunes:title: Episode 24: The Season Kicks into Gear! MidSouth, UCI doing Gravel, Loads of Q's!
item.description:
Welcome to another good'n!

In this episode we talk aesthetics, do you race to win at all costs... or should you eschew from time trial helmets in road (gravel) races? How about gravel gearing in road races, is a 200lb racer up for the win in a UCI road race? 

We've got that, plus loads of great listener questions on today's episode. Thanks for tuning in!

Some nice talking points from today's ep:

  • The Escape Collective is a great source for your cycling news needs. The Spin Cycle is especially good reading: escapecollective.com/spin-cycle-mon
  • All Bodies on Bikes is talked about for a place to find rides: www.allbodiesonbikes.com
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 23: Race Around Rwanda, Part 2
item.itunes:title: Episode 23: Race Around Rwanda, Part 2
item.description:
We're back with more intel on Ted's recent Race Around Rwanda. Stu and Laura pepper Ted with great questions submitted by the audience, this time around targeting the finale of the race, plus all the tech and gear questions that came in.

Stu's "Pick Three" is very time appropriate and the gang puts together their best ultra-playlist.

And to catch up on all the coverage of the race, Ted's compiled that into a blog which you can find here: www.iamtedking.com/blog/race-around-rwanda

  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast

  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 22: Race Around Rwanda, Part 1
item.itunes:title: Episode 22: Race Around Rwanda, Part 1
item.description:
Hello gravel fans! We've got a whopper of an episode today as the gang dissects Ted's successful return from Race Around Rwanda. First up, the opening professional and semi-professional traits of our hosts, next a riveting round of Pick Three, and then onto this 1,000 km bikepacking race all the way around the country of Rwanda. 

Buckle in for this one and stay tuned for the next part of this two part series!

  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 21: Let the Good Times Roll, the Season Has Begun!
item.itunes:title: Episode 21: Let the Good Times Roll, the Season Has Begun!
item.description:
Lots to discuss today, a busy birthday weekend complete with a surprise party, Stu's warm weather trip to Arizona, Ted being voted into the Gravel Cycling Hall of Fame and upcoming trip to Race Around Rwanda, lots of great questions about nutrition and staying limber and strong, and plenty more.

Some great content from the show. 

  • Here's Laura's video showing Ted that he's in the HoF: https://youtu.be/OYHh09U6jbg?si=FM38Yz-5Zt7xZyYX
  • Here's the Race Around Rwanda route: https://ridewithgps.com/routes/49334442
  • Ted's Prep for RAR: https://youtu.be/F7VEjHfHTaM?si=c-NbBSVawv9bA3pZ

item.title: Episode 20: New Year's Resolutions, A New Game, and Wearing Out Carbon Bikes
item.itunes:title: Episode 20: New Year's Resolutions, A New Game, and Wearing Out Carbon Bikes
item.description:
Here we go with episode 20! Lots to discuss on the start of a new year beginning with resolution. If Dry'uary is one of yours, here's a solid conversation starter. Next we'll play a new game called Pick Three, we get into the wear and tear or carbon bikes and if that's a thing, why there's an unwritten rule of bibs over shorts, and what's it like to ride lonely through these desolate winter months.

  • Per the conversation about Dry'uary, if you're interested in trying WHOOP, use Ted's code join.whoop.com/ted for a free WHOOP band and free first month!
  • We often talk about how awesome Cochrans Ski Area is. This Boston Globe article explains why it's not just another ski resort! https://www.bostonglobe.com/2025/01/07/magazine/cochrans-ski-area-beating-odds/

 

  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Check out Ted's year-capping video here: httphttps://youtu.be/rmu9yO15EIA
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 19: Year in Review, Gravel vs. World Tour Salaries, Dressing for Success, and More!
item.itunes:title: Episode 19: Year in Review, Gravel vs. World Tour Salaries, Dressing for Success, and More!
item.description:
Hello and welcome back to another great episode of Gravel Kings Podcast! We've got a barn burner today as we look back at the year in review courtesy of Strava, we examine salaries of World Tour riders as compared to the nascent world of gravel pros, we chat about how to deal with a case of the shimmies as well as a case of cold weather riding. It's that plus lots more, so welcome to the show.

  • Check out Ted's Cannondale year-end video of UCI Worlds here: https://youtu.be/ipqFah7Hrm0?si=RZ-nerU3Q5fQp7d6 
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or message your questions to the Instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 18: Strava's API disaster, Gravel Nationals, Winter is Looming, & More
item.itunes:title: Episode 18: Strava's API disaster, Gravel Nationals, Winter is Looming, & More
item.description:
The holidays are upon us here in Thanksgiving week and the team catches up on all kinds of timely discussions. Strava has changed their API usage, which presents lots of challenges for seemingly every cycling app on the planet! There are changes at USACycling with a move for gravel nationals. This has been in Nebraska and they're moving to the Driftless region of Minnesota. We'll talk about what goes into the creation of an annual gravel calendar, plus lots more.

  • Per our conversation today, check out Ted's winter riding tips: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0QmvOTbuviA and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g3S77LyTTRE 
  • DC Rainmaker's opinion on the Strava debacle: https://www.dcrainmaker.com/2024/11/stravas-changes-to-kill-off-apps.html 
  • Bond Almand's massive ride: https://open.spotify.com/episode/2d3rildu4mutWvhEwfvN8N?si=34f848aec70c450f&nd=1&dlsi=a4328ecbcca247ed
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or DM to the instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 17: Life Time Grand Prix Season Wrap AND
item.itunes:title: Episode 17: Life Time Grand Prix Season Wrap AND
item.description:
Welcome back to another great episode. In today's show we'll recount the 2024 gravel season through the eyes of the Life Time Grand Prix. Then we dissect the upcoming changes to the 2025 season, the rosters, and make estimates on the coming year.

We also tackle questions about the off-season, our favorite adventure races, and (as always) so much more!

  • Per our conversation today, check out the Melisa Rollins podcast with Ted here: https://iamtedking.podbean.com/e/episode-143-melisa-rollins-professional-cyclist/ 
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or DM to the instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 16: Lots and Lots of QnA!
item.itunes:title: Episode 16: Lots and Lots of QnA!
item.description:
You asked, we answered!

  • Are gravel bikes just mountain bikes from a decade ago?
  • How do events steer clear or town-gown drama?
  • To cyclocross: yes or no?
  • Is pumpkin pie the greatest dessert ever?
  • What's the deal with all the gravel series popping up around the world?

And don't forget...!

  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or DM to the instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 15: UCI Gravel Worlds Recap, King Challenge, Euro Tripping
item.itunes:title: Episode 15: UCI Gravel Worlds Recap, King Challenge, Euro Tripping
item.description:
Welcome to another great episode of Gravel Kings Podcast! On this episode we talk about the UCI Gravel World Championships as the Kings are fresh back from Brussels, Belgium. Stu is back from a trip to Budapest, so hear of the highs and lows from his European trip. The King Challenge successfully went off for it's 14th edition, where the hosting trio was together in-person in New Hampshire.

All that plus a whole selection of insightful listener questions about the UCI races, points, off-season train tools, and more.

  • See Ted's Gravel Worlds course preview here: https://youtu.be/MmZ_tPGSzz8?si=nXsM-QOM4zE-LpCr
  • Read Laura's race summary here: https://usacycling.org/article/laura-kings-experience-at-the-2024-uci-gravel-world-championships 
  • See Ted's race summary here: https://www.iamtedking.com/blog/a-week-in-review-the-uci-gravel-world-championships
  • Follow us at @gravelkingspodcast
  • Follow Ted at @iamtedking
  • Follow Laura at @lauracameronking
  • Follow Stu at @ridingthefences
  • Send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com or DM to the instagram handle above.

item.title: Episode 14: Italy, Switzerland, Romania, and Belgium, New Bikes, and Tire Questions
item.itunes:title: Episode 14: Italy, Switzerland, Romania, and Belgium, New Bikes, and Tire Questions
item.description:
The Kings have some very exciting news: They were selected for the UCI Gravel World Championships by USA Cycling! So after having just returned from Europe, they're headed back for this race across Flanders, Belgium.

Stu has a new bike and is thrilled with its aerodynamacy as well as it's simplicity thanks to SRAM eTap.

Y'all submitted questions about tires. That plus much more on this exciting episode.

Ted's Switzerland video: https://youtu.be/HQna-6xK8_g?si=RkscqgI7dmfESke-

Don't forget to submit your questions to GravelKingsPodcast@gmail.com and give us a follow at @gravelkingspodcast on Instagram.

item.title: Episode 13: Big Results on Little Training, Stage Racing, Training without Numbers
item.itunes:title: Episode 13: Big Results on Little Training, Stage Racing, Training without Numbers
item.description:
Labor Day weekend is in the rearview and that means late summer action is coming in hot! Stu is back to action at Fistful of Dirt in Wyoming, which is super exciting having spent most of the summer in rehab with a complicated, busted wing. The Kings logged Vermont Overland, Ted just completed the Green Mountain Stage Race, plus we tackle questions about maximizing ones results on minimal training, optimizing training without analytics of modern cycling, plus loads more.

Here's the video we discuss on group ride etiquete: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jfzhoAJfFGM

And Ted's podcast with Sam Boardman: https://open.spotify.com/episode/5cgJ9cOtM2RKjXTPBUWcd8

item.title: Episode 12: European Adventures and Stu's Back in Action!
item.itunes:title: Episode 12: European Adventures and Stu's Back in Action!
item.description:
Fresh back from a four week van trip followed immediately by a bike racing trip to Europe, the Kings have lots to talk about. This is Ted's first experience with UCI gravel, Laura has a terrific go at her women's elite race, all in hopes of qualifying for the UCI world championships. Meanwhile, Stu's recovery isn't yet complete, but it's at the point where he's ready to pin on a number at the upcoming Fistful of Dirt in Cody, WY.

International travel, the gravel arms race, what is each of our single races we would love to do forever, there's plenty to talk about in this fun episode.

item.title: Episode 11: The Wild West Road Trip
item.itunes:title: Episode 11: The Wild West Road Trip
item.description:
On the heals of Nepomuk Narly and The Last Best Ride, the Kings check in from Montana to talk all things gravel cycling. Given that gravel cyclists come from all disciplines and backgrounds, why not talk about the Tour, the gravel stage at the Tour, the wet and wild Olympic time trials, plus the Olympic mountain bike races. Riveting stuff here as the "second half" of the season kicks into gear.

Send your questions along, gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com and give us a follow at @gravelkingspodcast. Thanks for listening!

item.title: Episode 10: Midseason break, Dive into Tour Divide, Lots of Listener Questions
item.itunes:title: Episode 10: Midseason break, Dive into Tour Divide, Lots of Listener Questions
item.description:
After Unbound, the first weekend of June, it's inevitable that riders will take even just a bit of a break. Laura and Ted kept on the gas for a few more weeks before making their way to Maine for a week full of patriotic RnR. Stu continues on the mend, although with a considerable setback en route.

The Tour Divide is over for some but plenty remain on the route. We talk about the granddaddy of bikepacking races, the Tour Divide. 

The gang talk about their dreamy summer ride. What's the very best of the best during these sunny summer months.

What's the biggest meal we've eaten after a huge ride. Or what we prefer for optimal recovery... and best taste. 

Naturally, plus lots more!

Send your questions to GravelKingsPodcast@gmail.com

And follow us at @gravelkingspodcast on instagram

item.title: Episode 9: UCI Gravel Racing, A Visit to the PNW, An Ode to Fathers
item.itunes:title: Episode 9: UCI Gravel Racing, A Visit to the PNW, An Ode to Fathers
item.description:
With Stu's collarbone on the mend and the Kings tackling events on either side of North America, there's lots to chew on. Did you know the UCI requires no more than 10 intersections in their gravel races? Or something like that, we'll try to get to the bottom of whether the UCI is making for safe racing or just chasing entry fees.

Check out Ted's time at the Bon Jon Pass Out here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0DtzvAQqpdI

Send your questions to GravelKingsPodcast@gmail.com

And follow us at @gravelkingspodcast on instagram.

item.title: Episode 8: Unbound! (...and more)
item.itunes:title: Episode 8: Unbound! (...and more)
item.description:
Laura, Ted, and Stu catch up in the days after Unbound. They talk about the people's champion, Lachlan Morton winning the race in record setting fashion. The historic women's pro race where 9 women came to the line together in a sprint. Laura's magnificent run to podium the 100 mile race. Ted's visit to the "bathroom" along the side of the road. And Stu's continued recovery from a broken collarbone.

You've got questions? We've got answers. Send them to us, gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com!

item.title: Episode 7: Injuries, Heat, Nutrition, Mental Strategies, Ultra Distance, and more!
item.itunes:title: Episode 7: Injuries, Heat, Nutrition, Mental Strategies, Ultra Distance, and more!
item.description:
We hardly need a podcast episode summary because the title says it all! The crew catches up as the season is hitting it's spring peak. Stu is fresh off a visit to the orthopedist, Laura and Ted are still trying to rehydrate from a steamy hot Gravel Locos, as always, there's a lot going on.

Please send your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com

item.title: Episode 6: Events in the Rearview and Straight Ahead!
item.itunes:title: Episode 6: Events in the Rearview and Straight Ahead!
item.description:
Levi's Grand Fondo is done and dusted (albeit damply), Sea Otter happened, and now off to Portugal, Spain, Washington, Arizona, and elsewhere, the gang has some adventures coming up! We'll talk about The Traka postponing and then cancelling the 560km race outright, juggle training and bikepacking questions and more.

Speaking of questinos, email yours to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com and we will mail you a sticker! Include your mailing address, please and thanks. We don't yet have telepathy down.

Gravel Kings Podcast is now on instagram! @gravelkingspodcast

Follow Ted: @iamtedking

Follow Laura: @lauracameronking

Follow Stu: @ridingthefences

item.title: Episode 5: We're LIVE! Talking Levi's Gran Fondo and More
item.itunes:title: Episode 5: We're LIVE! Talking Levi's Gran Fondo and More
item.description:
We're excited to bring this episode to you live and in person here in California. We're on the eve of Levi's Gran Fondo, which has turned into a formidable race for 2024. We talk logistics of juggling many events, Stu's super cool FKT/OKT overnight adventure, and tackle your questions.

LGF preview video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n9usDIA6n8c

Send your questions to us at gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com

item.title: Episode 4: The Season Begins
item.itunes:title: Episode 4: The Season Begins
item.description:
With the calendar now reading spring, the gang is rocking and rolling with numbers on their handlebars! Stu is fresh back from a Grasshopper while Ted checked off the American Birkebeiner, Valley of Tears, and MidSouth all in back-to-back succession. 

Furthermore in the not too distant future is Levi's gran fondo and Sea Otter, where Laura will line up for the first time in 2024.

As referenced in the episode, here's Ted's video that covers his recent travel and racing:

https://youtu.be/2KY7_3mx27w?si=zYa03vRsc3_5oQ9a 

And just cause, if talk of the Grasshoppers or Megahopper piqued your interest, then check out that video here:

https://youtu.be/RxmubFyTO34?si=Xo55FnoG31cM8YTN

item.title: Episode 3: Traveling with Bikes
item.itunes:title: Episode 3: Traveling with Bikes
item.description: On the heels of trips to Mallorca, Florida, and Texas, the gang checks in first with where we've been, but then dives into some packing tips, tricks to get over jetlag and time zone fatigue, plus shares advice on how to best ride with a group of similar or varying abilities.

item.title: Episode 2: Long Haul Cycling
item.itunes:title: Episode 2: Long Haul Cycling
item.description:
The gang talks about their longest bike ride ever, Stu's upcoming 200 mile overnight adventure, and how they got into cycling in the first place.

Please submit your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com

item.title: Episode 1: Welcome to Gravel Kings
item.itunes:title: Episode 1: Welcome to Gravel Kings
item.description:
Professional cyclist Ted King joins his sometimes professional cycling wife, Laura King, and their friend, 46 year old age group cyclist Stu Streeter to talk about their venn diagram where life and gravel overlap. Welcome to their all new Gravel Kings podcast.

Winter riding on Ted's YouTube: https://youtu.be/0QmvOTbuviA?si=XeiyxxehWcL99EFu

Please submit your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com

item.title: Introducing Gravel Kings Podcast
item.itunes:title: Introducing Gravel Kings Podcast
item.description:
Hello and welcome to Gravel Kings!

Professional cyclist Ted King joins his wife, sometimes professional cyclist who lives life full-speed ahead, Laura, along with their friend, 46 year-old age grouper and long time cyclist, Stu Streeter in casual cycling conversation.

Please submit your questions to gravelkingspodcast@gmail.com
